title: Create: Diesel Generators x TFMG
description: a texture pack for create: diesel generators that makes its engines look like they're from create: the factory must grow
body:
this texture pack will change how the engines look in create: Diesel Generators to fit the style of engines from create: the factory must grow.



Create: Diesel generators:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-diesel-generators

Create: The Factory Must Grow:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-industry
